hooks.command: MEMORY_DIR='/Users/victoria/Projekte/Website Builder/Websites/ecomet/.memory' && echo '=== MEMORY SYSTEM GELADEN (ecomet) ===' && find "$MEMORY_DIR" -name '*.md' -not -name '_template.md' | sort | while read f; do echo "\n===== $(echo $f | sed "s|$MEMORY_DIR/||" ) ====="; cat "$f"; echo ''; done 2>/dev/null && echo '=== MEMORY ENDE ==='

echo '[MEMORY-UPDATE PFLICHT | ecomet] Session endet. Fuehre ALLE Schritte aus:

1) SESSION-LOG: .memory/sessions/YYYY-MM-DD-NR.md
2) INDEX: .memory/index.md aktualisieren
3) LESSONS LEARNED: Falls Fehler -> .memory/lessons-learned/LL-NNN.md
4) PROJEKT: .memory/projekte/ecomet.md (Status, Session-Tabelle, was umgesetzt wurde)
5) KONTEXT: .memory/kontext/ falls neue Erkenntnisse'
